mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId, plan_id AS planId, aircraft_id AS aircraftId, task_name AS taskName, task_type AS taskType, actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, actual_end_time AS actualEndTime, task_status AS taskStatus, engineer_id AS engineerId, remark, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM maintenance_task WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
